purpose: Defines allowed and blocked environment variable usage for future Supabase Auth activation.

allowed_browser_exposed_variables_future.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL
allowed_browser_exposed_variables_future.purpose: Public Supabase project URL for future browser auth client.

allowed_browser_exposed_variables_future.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
allowed_browser_exposed_variables_future.purpose: Public anon key for future browser auth client.

guardrails: This stage does not add real environment variables.
Do not expose service role key to frontend.
Do not enable live Auth in this stage.
Do not unlock dashboard data in this stage.
Do not unlock premium guidance in this stage.
